sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72846" key="o)kta/tupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-τῠπος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n72846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀκτάτροπος</ref> </xr> (q. v.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).117.21</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀκτάτροπος</foreign>) ; cf. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">octotropos,</tr_> [Manil.]<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.969</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
